title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
